app.subtitle: Camp Casey / Hovey / Bosan — info at a glance.
nav.helper: Press / to focus the chat input.
home.title: Most requested right now
home.calendarDerived: No holiday override — calendar weekday rules applied.
transit.title: 🚌 Bus / Train
transit.tooltip: Bus schedules automatically adjust based on today's day type (weekday, weekend, or training holiday). Tap any bus block to see all stop times.
transit.busHelper: Duplicate loop labels are merged by physical stop.
transit.referenceTimeHelper: Leave blank to use current time.
transit.providerHelper: The Jihaeng provider scaffold exists but has no timetable yet.
transit.destinationHelper: Leave blank to include all destinations.
transit.noBusBody: Check the stop name or adjust the reference time.
transit.noTrainBody: Clear the destination filter or switch to Bosan.
transit.liveTrackerNote: Position is estimated from the timetable and may differ from actual.
delivery.title: 🍔 Open stores
delivery.tooltip: We check the current time to tell you which stores are open right now.
holidays.title: 📅 2026 Holiday Calendar
holidays.tooltip: Green: confirmed holidays · Blue: pattern-based training holidays · Gray: unconfirmed dates
holidays.emptyBody: Turn off 'Confirmed only' to see more.
exchange.title: 💱 Live Exchange Rate
exchange.tooltip: Live exchange rate is applied to menu prices and the quick converter. Hit Refresh to update.
exchange.summaryHelper: Applied to menus, minimum orders, and chat conversions.
exchange.converterHint: Results appear instantly as you type.
chat.title: 💬 Ask anything
chat.tooltip: Ask anything about buses, trains, food delivery, holidays, or exchange rates.
chat.helper: Ask about buses, trains, delivery stores, holidays, or exchange rates.
chat.emptyBody: Examples: 'Is Warrior's Club open?' 'Next Incheon train from Bosan?'
chat.suggestBusQuery: When is the next Gate #1 bus?
chat.suggestTrainQuery: When is the next train from Bosan?
chat.suggestStoreQuery: Which delivery stores are open now?
